creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 154547
Remove missing files from pkg-plist

After revison 381703 this error was generated when packaging.

=======================<phase: package        >============================
===>  Building package for webfonts-0.30_8
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-fonts/webfonts/work/stage/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/webfonts/fonts.dir: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-fonts/webfonts/work/stage/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/webfonts/fonts.scale: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-fonts/webfonts/work/stage/usr/local/%%EXTRAFONTS%%/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/webfonts/tahoma.ttf: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /wrkdirs/usr/ports/x11-fonts/webfonts/work/stage/usr/local/%%EXTRAFONTS%%/usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/webfonts/tahomabd.ttf: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
